output.code:
# Read the file and display content and length and repr for clarity
path = "/mnt/data/file-NYaFdre39StWGQAjzhivmK-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data = f.read()
text = data.decode("utf-8")
print("Length:", len(text))
print("First 200 chars (repr):")
print(repr(text[:200]))
print("\nFull text:")
print(text)[:1000]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-NYaFdre39StWGQAjzhivmK-text_to_analyse.txt","r", encoding="utf-8").read()
print("Total len:", len(text))
print("Start repr:", repr(text[:30]))
print("Index of 'قال رسول':", text.find("قال رسول"))
start_in_matn = text.find("إن الله")
print("Index of 'إن الله':", start_in_matn)
print("Character at that index and next 50 chars repr:")
print(repr(text[start_in_matn:start_in_matn+200]))
print("\nLast 200 chars repr:")
print(repr(text[-200:]))
print("\nFull last 400 chars:")
print(text[-400:])[:200]

print("Last char repr:", repr(text[-1]))
print("Last 10 chars repr:", repr(text[-10:]))
print("Substring from start index to end length:", len(text[start_in_matn:]))

for i,ch in enumerate(text[:60]):
    print(i, repr(ch))

span = text[36:]
print("Contains newline in span?", "\n" in span)
print("First 200 chars repr:", repr(span[:200]))
print("Last 200 chars repr:", repr(span[-200:]))
